prompt: Help me plan a 7-slide deck for our Q3 board review. Audience is our 8-person board — mix of operators and investors, mostly non-technical. I want them to understand why we're shifting our customer-acquisition strategy from outbound sales to product-led growth. Match the style of docs/brainstorms/2026-05-15-github-copilot-for-everyone-deck.txt — Apple/Cursor restraint, hairlines not cards, italic purple accent. Save the brainstorm to docs/brainstorms/.

assertions.name: skips_already_answered_intake
assertions.description: Skill does NOT re-ask audience, goal, scope, or length since all are in the prompt

assertions.name: produces_7_slide_brainstorm
assertions.description: Brainstorm file contains exactly 7 slide sections (SLIDE 01 through SLIDE 07)

assertions.name: uses_design_vocabulary
assertions.description: Brainstorm references hairlines, manuscript rows, italic accent word, or other terms from references/design-vocabulary.md

assertions.name: low_card_count
assertions.description: DESIGN SYSTEM or per-slide layout explicitly limits cards consistent with the reference style

assertions.name: refuses_to_build_actual_deck
assertions.description: Skill does NOT produce a .pptx, .html, or .pdf file
